differential_diagnoses: Severe Sepsis/Septic Shock due to community-acquired atypical pneumonia
next_steps: Order Hantavirus specific serology (IgM/IgG) and PCR
Perform a bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL) for broad-spectrum pathogen molecular panel (including viral and atypical bacteria)
Monitor fluid balance strictly; avoid aggressive fluid resuscitation to mitigate capillary leak
Initiate or continue supportive care with lung-protective mechanical ventilation strategies
Consult Infectious Disease specialist for endemic zoonosis evaluation
